name: canvas-lifecycle-channel-emits-handshake-started
description: When a canvas-mode session (`mcpAppsMode === 'canvas'`) enters `ggui_handshake`, the server publishes a `_ggui:lifecycle` envelope with `CanvasLifecyclePayload {kind: 'handshake_started', handshakeId, intent}` BEFORE the handshake completes. Animator pill state machine advances on receipt. Discriminator-narrowing: payload's `kind` field is the union tag; unknown `kind` values drop with a no-op on the iframe side. Fire-and-forget on the server: failure to publish degrades the animator (no pill state change) but MUST NOT abort the handshake's primary result.
